{{Quote|If we're lucky it'll be someone like Disk Moosea in that Octofoil.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="TPE" />}}
An '''Octofoil''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] model used by the [[Torgaigne]], a crime syndicate that operated out of [[Attahox/Legends|Attahox]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. [[Disk Moosea]] and [[Vor Childermoss]] were known to use them.

{{Ship-stub}}
